name: Lamb in a Hot Garlic Sauce
recipeIngredient: Fresh sprigs of mint and/or Cilantro to garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch the greens in boiling water for 1 minute. Drain and place on a serving dish.
2. Heat the oil in a wok and stir-fry the lamb until nearly cooked, about 2 minutes.
3. Add the garlic, pepper, sugar, Nuoc Mam sauce, and oyster sauce. Stir-fry until the lamb is completely cooked and tender.
4. Pour the lamb and sauce over the greens.
5. Garnish with mint and/or cilantro.
